overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking across a medieval stone bridge over a river, passing guards in red and blue armor, then continuing onto a winding dirt path through rural countryside with sunflower fields and dense forests under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone bridge with wooden railings over river

events.description: Geralt turns right to look over the bridge railing at the river water below
Geralt passes close by a guard standing on the left side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily across the stone bridge, briefly turning to observe the river flowing beneath

notable_agents.action: guard in red and blue armor standing with spear, facing opposite direction
guard leaning against wooden railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge deck with weathered stone texture and wooden plank sections
rough wooden fence railings with vertical posts along bridge sides
deep blue flowing river visible through the bridge railings
wooden watchtower with pointed roof at the far end of the bridge
tall stone towers and buildings visible on the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a medieval stone bridge with wooden railings over a deep blue river. The camera follows from behind as he passes guards in red and blue armor, one standing at attention and another leaning on the railing. He briefly turns to look at the water before continuing toward a wooden guard tower visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the bridge exit with wooden fortifications

events.description: Geralt steps off the stone bridge onto the dirt ground at the bridge exit

agents.ego_description: continuing across the bridge toward the guard post, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: guard standing at attention near wooden fortification structure

entered.detail: wooden defensive structure with platforms and red banners at bridge exit
dirt trail leading away from the bridge into the countryside

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the end of the bridge where wooden fortifications with red banners mark the exit. The guard tower looms larger as he nears it. The river and distant town spires fall behind as he focuses on the dirt path ahead leading into the rural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path through sunflower fields and forest edge

events.description: path curves left around a large oak tree as Geralt follows the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path through countryside, passing sunflowers and wooden fences

notable_agents.action: guard in red cloak walking ahead on the dirt path in same direction

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and wagon ruts
split-rail wooden fence lining the right side of the path
field of yellow sunflowers behind wooden fencing
massive spreading oak tree with thick trunk at path junction
dense green forest edge with tall pine trees

segments.scene_description: Having left the bridge behind, Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through open countryside. Sunflower fields bloom behind wooden fences on the left while dense forest edges approach on the right. He passes under the branches of a large oak tree as the trail curves through the rural landscape, following a guard in a red cloak who walks ahead on the same path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a structured medieval bridge crossing into an expansive rural countryside. It begins behind Geralt as he traverses a stone bridge over a deep blue river, passing guards in red and blue armor while a distant guard tower comes into view. As he reaches the end of the bridge, the scene shifts past wooden fortifications and red banners, leaving the river and town spires behind in favor of a dirt path. The environment then opens up into the countryside, where the camera follows Geralt and a cloaked guard along a winding trail flanked by blooming sunflower fields and wooden fences. Finally, the path curves through the rural landscape, passing under the heavy branches of a large oak tree as dense forest edges close in on the right.
